summary: Comprehensive testing of Document Linkage and Process Checklist features (iteration_85). Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All document linkage and process checklist UI elements verified in both ShipmentCaptureDialog and PODraftDetailDrawer. Regression tests from iteration_83 and iteration_84 pass.

issues: React hydration warnings in console due to <span> inside <tbody> - cosmetic only, no functional impact (existing issue from iteration_84)

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/document-links creates document linkage for sales_order
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/document-links creates document linkage for po_draft
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/document-links rejects invalid entity_type with 422
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/document-links rejects invalid document_type with 422
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/document-links lists linked docs sorted newest first
Backend: DELETE /api/inventory-ledger/document-links/{id} removes linkage
Backend: DELETE /api/inventory-ledger/document-links/{id} returns 404 for unknown ID
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/document-links/checklist/sales-order/{id} returns warehouse checklist (customer_po_attached, approval_support_present, warehouse_agreement)
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/document-links/checklist/sales-order/{id} returns drop_ship checklist (customer_po_attached, approval_support_present, ds_po_draft_created)
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/document-links/checklist/po-draft/{id} returns PO draft checklist (vendor_assigned, export_ready, support_doc_present)
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/sales-orders/{id}/summary includes linked_document_count, linked_documents_by_type, process_checklist, checklist_complete
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id} includes linked_document_count, linked_documents_by_type, process_checklist, checklist_complete
Backend: Checklist updates correctly when docs are added/removed
Backend: Regression - iteration_84 drop-ship PO workflow still works
Backend: Regression - iteration_83 order type awareness still works
Frontend: ShipmentCaptureDialog shows DocumentLinksSection with add form and linked docs list
Frontend: ShipmentCaptureDialog shows ProcessChecklistSection with checked/unchecked items
Frontend: Document add form has type selector (customer_po, warehouse_agreement, approval_backup, vendor_po_support, other), name input, url input, notes input
Frontend: PODraftDetailDrawer shows DOCUMENTS section with linked docs and add button
Frontend: PODraftDetailDrawer shows PROCESS CHECKLIST with status badge (Complete/Incomplete)
Frontend: Checklist items show check mark for satisfied, warning triangle for unsatisfied
Frontend: Document can be deleted via trash icon
critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2965-3027: Document links CRUD endpoints (POST/GET/DELETE) with validation
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 3030-3067: Helper functions for document links summary and SO checklist derivation
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 3070-3088: PO draft checklist derivation (vendor_assigned, export_ready, support_doc_present)
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 3091-3123: Checklist endpoints for SO and PO draft
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2854-2860: DS summary enrichment with doc links and checklist
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2951-2957: Warehouse summary enrichment with doc links and checklist
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 1062-1068: PO draft detail enrichment with doc links and checklist
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 734-826: DocumentLinksSection reusable component
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 829-848: ProcessChecklistSection reusable component
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 1170-1172: DocumentLinksSection and ProcessChecklistSection in ShipmentCaptureDialog
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 2463-2465: DocumentLinksSection and ProcessChecklistSection in PODraftDetailDrawer

seed_data_used.test_customer: Healthy Corp (HC-22137) for PO draft testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Document linkage and process checklist fully implemented in iteration_85. New collection: document_links. Document types: customer_po, warehouse_agreement, approval_backup, vendor_po_support, other. Entity types: sales_order, po_draft. Checklist for warehouse SO: customer_po_attached + approval_support_present + warehouse_agreement. Checklist for drop_ship SO: customer_po_attached + approval_support_present + ds_po_draft_created. Checklist for PO draft: vendor_assigned + export_ready + support_doc_present. DocumentLinksSection and ProcessChecklistSection are reusable components used in both ShipmentCaptureDialog and PODraftDetailDrawer. All iteration_83 and iteration_84 features still work.

create_document_link.validation: Rejects invalid entity_type or document_type with 422
